title: Move an item from a board to another board and to a specific group in the destination board.

posts.author: Amm1 (Andreina Mendez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I have a board with different groups, but same items in each board.

  • Example, all have a week 1, week 2, week 3 item and the start dates correspond to each week; each week start date is the same for each group (ex. all week 2 start 05/20). So there is no status field nor a distinguishable field from group to group.

Now I want to move each week to a new board and into a specific group in the destination board, but right now the items are going into a random group. So I tried to add an additional rule to move it into a specific group on the board, but that failed because it was trying to move it within the original board group instead of within the destination board after it was moved over.

So essentially all the weeks will move to a new board once the week has passed, but I want each week to go to a specific group on the new board.
What I tried was " 7 days after Week Start Date arrives, then move group item to “Board 2” and then move group item to group but this second group is the group from the Board 1 and not Board 2.
I don’t see a way to chose the group destination within group 2.

Can you add a feature to be able to select a group for the destination within another board?
